# Neuroceutical Solutions

> South African distributor of premium, science-backed nootropics and cognitive enhancement products. Based in Pietermaritzburg, serving customers and brand partners across South Africa.

Neuroceutical Solutions partners with global brands to bring scientifically formulated supplements for focus, memory, mental clarity, stress relief and mental fatigue support to the South African market. The site serves both consumers (B2C product discovery) and brand partners (B2B free sample distribution program).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the brand, featured products and audience selector for consumers vs partners.
- [About](/about): Company story, founder, distribution standards and South African focus.
- [Products](/products): Full nootropic and cosmetic peptide catalog with search and category filters.
- [Science](/science): Research methodology, ingredient overviews and SAHPRA-compliant claims.
- [Guides](/guides): Educational articles on nootropics, cognitive health and supplement use.
- [Newsletter](/newsletter): Subscribe for new product launches and recent newsletter issues.
- [Get Started](/get-started): Information for brands wanting to join the free sample distribution program.
- [Contact](/contact): Customer service and partnership enquiries.
- [Peptides](/peptides): Cosmetic peptide skincare landing page (GHK-Cu, Argireline, Matrixyl 3000, Eyeliss).
- [Peptide Products](/peptides/products): Filterable cosmetic peptide product catalog.
- [Peptide Science](/peptides/science): Science behind cosmetic peptide formulations.
- [Peptide Guides](/peptides/guides): Educational articles on peptide skincare.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): POPIA-aligned privacy practices.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): SAHPRA-aligned medical and cosmetic disclaimers.
